summary: Completed frontend-only validation for MyDesk SPA routes and core workflows. Most flows pass, but two critical navigation integrations are reproducibly broken.

ui_bugs.issue: One interactive element is missing data-testid.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking View in row menu does not navigate to invoice detail route; user remains on #/invoices.
After milestone is marked done, Send invoice action does not navigate to created invoice detail screen.

issues: Several tiny muted texts have low contrast against dark background, reducing readability.

action_items: Fix invoice row menu View action navigation wiring in invoices screen.
Fix milestone Send invoice navigation from project detail after invoice creation.
Add data-testid to footer external link (Made with Emergent) if it is intended to be in testing scope.
Improve low-contrast tiny muted text styles on dark backgrounds.
critical_code_review_comments: App.css is >700 lines (1172 lines observed). Split styles into focused modules per screen/component for maintainability.
Navigation side-effects rely on hash assignment + state updates from multiple screens; consider centralized route transition helper with post-action assertions to prevent silent no-op clicks.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data file created. Runtime localStorage test records were created during UI flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated hash routes, dashboard widgets, editor save/send/mark-paid, clients CRUD, settings persistence and reset modal. Reproducible failures remain in invoice row View navigation and project milestone Send invoice navigation; start by instrumenting onNav calls in invoices.js and projects.js click handlers.
rca of the issue: RCA (frontend integration): 1) Invoice row View: action handler executes without visible errors but route remains #/invoices after click; likely event handling/state race or menu overlay click target conflict around row-menu action. 2) Project milestone Send invoice: button becomes visible after mark done, but expected route change to #/invoice-detail/:id does not occur after click even though UI indicates milestone state/link updates. Repro steps: open #/invoices, search INV-0144, row menu > View; and open #/project-detail/p1, mark M3 done, click Send invoice. Mitigation: instrument handler execution and created invoice id, then assert window.location.hash update immediately after onNav invocation.
